name: fptu-lost-found-system
description: AI-powered Lost & Found Management System for FPT University campus.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n API,WEB,JAVA -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:java"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:all: npm run build:api && npm run build:web && npm run build:java
